name: Jackery Explorer 2000 Plus
description: Jackery Explorer 2000 Plus delivers 2kWh capacity with 3,000W output, expandable to 24kWh. The gold standard for camping and emergency backup.
longDescription: Jackery Explorer 2000 Plus is our best overall portable power station. Jackery Explorer 2000 Plus delivers 2kWh capacity with 3,000W output, expandable to 24kWh. The gold standard for camping and emergency backup. After extensive hands-on testing, we found it delivers on its promises with 2,042wh expandable to 24kwh.
cons: No app connectivity on base model
verdict: Jackery Explorer 2000 Plus is our top recommendation for overall portable power station. 2,042Wh expandable to 24kWh.

faqs.answer: Jackery Explorer 2000 Plus delivers 2kWh capacity with 3,000W output, expandable to 24kWh. The gold standard for camping and emergency backup.

faqs.answer: Yes — 2,042wh expandable to 24kwh. Very expensive at $2,199 is the main trade-off.
